note: New Jersey expanded Medicaid. Adults up to 138% FPL qualify through NJ FamilyCare. CHIP covers children up to 350% FPL.

programs.name: SNAP (New Jersey)
programs.full_name: Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program — New Jersey
programs.description: New Jersey administers federal SNAP. Apply through NJ OneApp (mynjhelps.us).

application.where: mynjhelps.us or local County Board of Social Services

programs.name: NJ FamilyCare (Medicaid)
programs.description: NJ FamilyCare covers adults up to 138% FPL and children up to 350% FPL. No premium for most adults; small premiums may apply for higher-income children.

monthly_benefit_range.note: No premium for most enrollees at or below 138% FPL.

income.note: NJ expanded Medicaid — adults up to 138% FPL qualify through NJ FamilyCare.

programs.name: WorkFirst NJ (TANF)
programs.full_name: WorkFirst New Jersey — Temporary Assistance for Needy Families
programs.description: NJ's WorkFirst program provides monthly cash to families with children. A family of 3 can receive approximately $559/month.

eligibility_rules.who: Families with children under 18 (or 19 if in school)

income.note: Must be below income limits; work participation required

application.where: mynjhelps.us or local County Board of Social Services
